Container.Name: cothimich
Container.Overview: GPS-disciplined NTP server running gpsd and chrony. Requires a USB or serial GPS receiver. Serves NTP to your LAN and exposes gpsd on port 2947 for location clients.

Config.Name: GPS Device
Config.Description: Path to your GPS receiver device. Common values: /dev/ttyUSB0 (most USB GPS), /dev/ttyACM0 (u-blox). Check Unraid terminal with: ls /dev/ttyUSB* /dev/ttyACM*

Config.Name: PPS Device (optional)
Config.Description: PPS device for sub-millisecond accuracy. Only needed if your GPS has a PPS output pin wired up. Leave blank if unsure.

Config.Name: GPS Device Path
Config.Description: Must match the GPS Device mapping above.

Config.Name: GPS Baud Rate
Config.Description: Baud rate for your GPS receiver. Common values: 9600 (most cheap modules), 57600, 115200 (u-blox and higher-end units). Check your GPS datasheet.

Config.Name: Chrony Drift File
Config.Description: Persistent storage for chrony drift file. Helps chrony sync faster after restarts.
